name: Chopstix Glass Noodle Salad
recipeIngredient: Bean threads or rice sticks, 8 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak bean threads or rice sticks in hot water until soft, about 30 minutes.
2. Drain thoroughly and cut into 4-inch lengths.
3. Snap off stems of snow peas and discard the stems. Blanch the snow peas for 5 seconds in boiling water, then transfer to a bowl of ice water. When cold, drain and pat dry, then cut into fine slivers.
4. Stem and seed the sweet red pepper, then slice into 2-inch slivers.
5. Remove and discard any dirty ends from the mushrooms and separate the strands.
6. In a food processor or blender, mince the garlic and ginger. Add the orange peel, cilantro, and green onions. Process until finely minced, then add the remaining dressing ingredients and blend to combine.
7. To assemble, combine the bean threads (or rice sticks) with the other salad ingredients. Pour the dressing over and toss thoroughly to combine. The salad may be prepared up to 2 hours in advance.
